welcome: Hey! Let's calculate how much time and money you lose when writing posts yourself.
ask_hours: How many hours per week do you spend coming up with ideas and writing posts? (enter a number)
ask_hour_rate: How much is your working hour worth? (in USD) If unsure, enter 20
loss_calculation: You're losing ${loss} per month just on writing posts!
intro_story:
Imagine using that time to grow your business or relax with family. I'll help you create ready-to-post content in minutes.

One friend of mine struggled for months with posts — he'd delete them after publishing, thinking nobody cared. Then he tried something...
story_question: Want to know what helped him?
ask_blocker: Then write down what's stopping you from publishing posts right now?
blocker_thanks: Thanks! That's exactly what I'll help you with. Let's start!
story_skip: Okay, let's get straight to business.
user_type_prompt:
🔹 Great! We'll develop your personal brand.

🏢 I have a business — want to attract partners
personal_interests_prompt: What matters most to you in life? (you can select multiple)
topic_prompt: Pick one topic for your posts:
social_prompt: Which social network do you use?
style_prompt: To match your voice, share a few examples of your favorite posts (links or text). If none, type 'skip'.
keywords_prompt: Want posts to hit the mark even better? Add keywords for each post type. Example for selling: 'discount, offer, buy'. If not, press 'Skip all'.
profile_link_prompt: Send me a link to your social profile so I can adapt the style to your writing. Optional.
generating:
⚡️ Generating 4 posts just for you...
(usually takes less than 3 seconds each)
feedback_prompt: What exactly would you like to change?
contact_expert: Send your phone or Telegram contact, we'll reach out.
publish_instructions: ✅ Post ready! Copy the text and publish on your social network.
final_message: 🔥 How did you like these posts? Want to receive them regularly?
referral_message:
Invite friends — you'll get 10% of each friend's payment!
Your link: {link}
business_calc_prompt: Great! Let's evaluate your business potential for a partner network.
business_product_question: What product or service do you sell? (briefly)
business_frequency_question: How often do customers typically buy from you?
business_avg_check: What is the average purchase amount? (in USD)
business_loyalty: Do you have a loyalty program, subscription, or repeat sales?
business_ltv_months: What is the average customer lifetime (in months)?
business_thanks: Thank you! We've saved your data. Now we'll generate posts to attract partners.
oneshop_course_offer:
✨ Now the most interesting part!

Do you want not just to write posts, but to learn how to make money with AI and join the OneShop team? We have a short course 'NeuroStart' — only $6 (500 RUB).

✅ Just 4 lessons
✅ Learn at your own pace
✅ With AI tutor Shelley
✅ After the course, you can invite newcomers and earn up to level 10!

Learn how AI can help you in business and life.
oneshop_course_info:
**Course 'NeuroStart' (v2.0)**

You can pay and take it in your personal cabinet:
🔹 Sirbio: Learning → Sirbio Learning → 'NEUROSTART'
🔹 Artis: Catalog → Artis Programs → 'NEUROSTART'

Price: 500 RUB (can be paid with bonuses, any account).

After completing, send a screenshot of the final slide — we'll mark you as ready for partnership and you'll be able to invite newcomers to OneShop.

[Watch video overview](https://youtu.be/your_link) — discover the program!
oneshop_course_already_done: Have you already completed the 'NeuroStart' course? Send a screenshot of the final report, and I'll mark you as an active partner.
oneshop_course_confirm: Thank you! Your status has been updated. Now you can invite newcomers and build your structure.
oneshop_course_invalid: Could not recognize the screenshot. Please make sure the image shows the final course report. Try again or contact support.
